_comment: Architecture boundary rules for arch-guard. Copy to .claude/vibe/arch-rules.json and customize.

rules.name: services-no-ui
rules.reason: Services must be UI-agnostic for testability and reuse

rules.name: domain-no-infra
rules.reason: Domain layer must not depend on infrastructure (Clean Architecture)

rules.name: components-no-pages
rules.reason: Shared components must not import from page-level modules

rules.name: models-no-controllers
rules.reason: Models must not depend on request/response layer (MVC)

rules.name: no-direct-db-in-handlers
rules.reason: Handlers must use services, not access the database directly
